reviews.review_title: Very fun but room for improvement
reviews.review_description:
It's a blast from the past but I hope the developers improve some things. I know meta allows you to remove boundaries and the boundaries constantly popping up when I play was annoying. Sometimes the balloons would fly away out of reach. Lastly I hope they add full body support so I could kick up the balloon with my feet. That was my save move as a kid.

Edit: 10 months later and the developers still haven't removed the guardian. Looks like they abandoned the game. Shame

developer_response.body: Thank you dave72999. It's great to hear you would benefit from the guardian removal. We're working on an update removing the guardian along with a few other enhancements. Much appreciated on the awesome rating.

reviews.review_description: Super simple, super fun. It's amazing how keeping a virtual balloon up in the air can bring back memories of doing the real thing as a kid. I like how you jump straight into gameplay without having to navigate any menus or buttons.
Such a fun mixed reality experience everyone in the family is enjoying.
Great concept with lots of potential. Particular focus on user experience and sound design in this early version echoes how refined the final product could become!
This experience is a great showcase of nostalgic gameplay, and the added focus on mixed-reality makes this game a perfect app to show friends and family!

reviews.review_title: Reminder of simpler times in our youth
reviews.review_description: This game is a wonderful experience that brings you back to the joy you felt when playing with balloons as a child. The physics of the game are great and it actually poses quite a challenge to fulfill the objectives. At times i'd say you can even consider a workout.

developer_response.body: Thank you DavidPripas for the review. Warms our heart to hear your sentiment, and we're glad to hear you felt some of the activity benefits we were aiming for.

reviews.review_description: It's a fun game! The virtual balloon function as real balloon and love how interact in the wall in my room. Great implementation! One suggestion I have is to implement to change to Station mode and Room scale mode. I played with station mode and I wasn't able to get balloon that far away.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the thoughtful feedback AnmaaVR and great rating. We're gathering feedback to improve for future updates and will launch one ASAP.
